Fixture Spec

Overview

Companion spec to 01_requirements.html#goals. Validates that cross-doc anchors round-trip cleanly across both directions.

Goals

Two goals:

  1. Demonstrate <section id> + heading-id contract.
  2. Exercise <pre><code> + <table> + <dl> shapes per conventions §6/§7/§5.

FR table

IDRequirement
FR-03.1every h2/h3 carries an id
FR-92cross-doc anchors resolve

Decisions

D1 — HTML-first artifacts
Per spec D5; legacy MD only for explicit fallbacks.

Rationale

node assets/serve.js .
Source: docs/pmos/features/2026-05-09_html-artifacts-fixture/02_spec.html
